attacking_style: Designated finisher for intermediate sprints and bonus opportunities rather than a pure stage winner. Positioned for controlled efforts in organized scenarios.
team_tactics: Gazprom deploys minimal resources strategically, using Kochetkov as primary option for bonus seconds and intermediate sprints even with skeleton squads. Shares bonus hunting duties with teammates like Strakhov.
terrain_preference: Flatter stages and intermediate sprint points where positioning and timing matter more than pure power. Less effective in high-intensity finishes against younger, explosive riders.
vulnerability: Vulnerable to younger, faster finishers in the final meters despite good positioning. Struggles when the pace becomes explosive after controlled approaches.
key_patterns: Designated as team's primary finisher for bonus opportunities in stage races (2 observations)
Works within small team structures, often 4-rider squads, requiring tactical efficiency (2 observations)
Beaten by younger riders in direct sprint confrontations despite proper positioning (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistently used in tactical bonus-hunting role but showing limitations against younger competition in final execution
